title: BYO corpus record — notion
description: A Notion page or database. Title -> the title property; content -> the page block tree (served verbatim). `teamspace` is the grouping unit. A database row is a page with `parent` set to the database's doc_id.

content.description: The retrieval payload served verbatim as the page block tree (database: the description).

teamspace.description: The teamspace this page/database belongs to (default: the source_type).

group.description: ACL group owning the teamspace (default: slug(teamspace)).

visibility.description: public = org-wide, group = the teamspace's group, private = author only.

readers.description: Explicit reader principals (emails -> users, else group ids). Overrides visibility.

meta.description: Free-form per-source structured extras merged into the record.

subtype.description: Object type (default: page). A database contains rows (pages whose parent is the database).

parent.description: doc_id of the parent (database for a row, or a page for a subpage).

properties.description: Database property schema (on a database) or row property values (on a database row).

created.description: Creation time (epoch seconds or ISO 8601). Default: synthesized from doc_id.

updated.description: last_edited_time (epoch seconds or ISO 8601). Default: created.

items.description: A comment on the page (served via the comments API).

created_ts.description: Optional creation time (epoch seconds or ISO string).
